member.name: M:OrderProcessing.API.Controller.OrdersController.PlaceOrder(OrderProcessing.Application.DTOs.PlaceOrderRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Validates product existence and stock availability. Supports client-provided idempotency key so retries return the same result. Returns 201 with created order on success.
member.param: Order payload including customer and items.

member.name: M:OrderProcessing.API.Controller.OrdersController.GetOrder(System.Guid)
member.returns: Order details or 404 if not found.

member.name: M:OrderProcessing.API.Controller.ProductsController.GetAll
member.summary: Returns all active products with current stock. Useful to discover product ids for placing orders.

member.name: M:OrderProcessing.API.Controller.ProductsController.Get(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns a single product by id.
